2605.17999.title: Shared Backbone PPO for Multi-UAV Communication Coverage with Connection Preservation
2605.17999.paper_summary: This paper proposes a Shared Backbone Proximal Policy Optimization (Shared Backbone PPO) algorithm. By sharing the base module between the Actor and Critic networks, the algorithm achieves efficient training and improved performance. The algorithm is implemented in a connectivity-preserving multi-UAV swarm communication coverage task and compared with the standard PPO algorithm. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior performance. Furthermore, a graph information aggregation module is incorporated into the model architecture to accommodate the communication conditions among agents. With the integration of this module, the algorithm remains effective, and the trained agent swarm exhibits a higher level of cooperation.
2605.17999.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文提出了一種共享骨幹近端策略優化（Shared Backbone PPO）算法。<lb/>通過在演員和評論家網絡之間共享基礎模塊，該算法實現了高效的訓練和性能提升。<lb/>該算法在一個保持連接的多無人機群體通信覆蓋任務中實施，並與標準PPO算法進行比較。<lb/>實驗結果表明，所提出的方法達到了更優越的性能。<lb/>此外，模型架構中還納入了一個圖形信息聚合模塊，以適應代理之間的通信條件。<lb/>隨著該模塊的整合，算法仍然保持有效，訓練後的代理群體展現出更高水平的合作。
2605.17999.author: Z. Jiang et.al.
